_comment: Curated starting set of MCP connectors for Urfael. Connectors = MCP servers, the open standard the `claude` brain already speaks (`claude mcp add`). The full ecosystem is ~18,000+ servers (curated) / 38,000+ (indexed) across glama.ai, mcp.so, pulsemcp.com and the official registry — any of them works; this file just makes the popular ones one-command + previewed. Each `add` shows a security preview + a static scan + masks secrets BEFORE anything is written, and runs ONLY on owner (local) turns — sandboxed remote/cron turns load no connectors (--strict-mcp-config).
_schema: id, name, category, transport(npx|uvx|http|sse), pkg(for npx/uvx) | url(for http/sse), auth(none|key|oauth|local), env[{key,label}] (secrets to prompt for), note, verified
_unverified_note: verified:false means the canonical package/endpoint was not pinned during research — the preview still shows the exact command and you confirm the source before it runs.

connectors.name: GitHub
connectors.note: Repos, issues, PRs, code search — official hosted server.

connectors.name: GitLab
connectors.note: Archived reference package; community successors exist.

connectors.name: Git (local repos)
connectors.note: Inspect local git repositories you point it at.

connectors.name: Filesystem
connectors.note: Read/write files under a directory you grant — powerful, scope it tightly.

connectors.name: Sentry
connectors.note: Errors, issues, releases.

connectors.name: Linear
connectors.note: Issues, projects, cycles.

connectors.name: Jira + Confluence
connectors.note: Atlassian's hosted server — Jira and Confluence in one.

connectors.name: Postgres
connectors.note: Read-only SQL. Archived ref pkg; some forks take the URL as an arg — check the preview.

connectors.name: SQLite
connectors.note: Query a local .db file you point it at.

connectors.name: Playwright (browser)
connectors.note: Drives a real browser — real machine control. Owner turns only.

connectors.name: Puppeteer (browser)
connectors.note: Headless-browser automation. Archived ref pkg.

connectors.name: Context7 (live docs)
connectors.note: Up-to-date library/framework docs on demand.

connectors.name: Notion
connectors.note: Pages, databases, search — official hosted server.

connectors.name: Obsidian

env.label: Obsidian Local REST API bearer key

connectors.note: Needs the 'Local REST API' community plugin — talks to localhost only.

connectors.name: Google Drive
connectors.note: Search and read Drive files. Archived ref pkg.

connectors.name: Google Calendar
connectors.note: Events, availability. Community package — confirm the source.

connectors.name: Gmail
connectors.note: Read/draft/send mail. Community package — confirm the source.

connectors.name: Slack
connectors.note: Channels, messages, search. Archived ref pkg.

connectors.name: Todoist
connectors.note: Tasks, projects, due dates.

connectors.name: Airtable
connectors.note: Bases, tables, records.

connectors.name: AWS
connectors.note: Official awslabs server — broad API reach. Scope the IAM role.

connectors.name: Cloudflare
connectors.note: Workers, DNS, R2, logs — official hosted servers.

connectors.name: Stripe
connectors.note: Use a RESTRICTED key, never your live secret key.

connectors.name: Supabase
connectors.note: Projects, tables, SQL.

connectors.name: Neon
connectors.note: Serverless Postgres — branches, queries.

connectors.name: Redis
connectors.note: Official redis/mcp-redis server.

connectors.name: Brave Search
connectors.note: Vendor-maintained successor to the archived ref pkg.

connectors.name: Tavily
connectors.note: Search + extract, tuned for agents.

connectors.name: Exa
connectors.note: Neural web search.

connectors.name: Fetch
connectors.note: Fetch a URL and return it as markdown. Reference server.

connectors.name: Firecrawl
connectors.note: Crawl + scrape sites into clean text.

connectors.name: Perplexity
connectors.note: Ask-the-web with citations.

connectors.name: Memory (knowledge graph)
connectors.note: A persistent local knowledge graph. Reference server.

connectors.name: Sequential Thinking
connectors.note: Structured step-by-step reasoning scratchpad. Reference server.

connectors.name: Qdrant (vectors)
connectors.note: Vector store for semantic memory.

connectors.name: Chroma (vectors)
connectors.note: Embeddable vector database.

connectors.name: Resend (email)
connectors.note: Send transactional email.

connectors.name: Telegram
connectors.note: Community package — confirm the source.

connectors.name: WhatsApp
connectors.note: Community package (local bridge) — confirm the source.

connectors.name: Twilio (SMS/voice)
connectors.note: Community/alpha package — confirm the source.

connectors.name: Time / timezone
connectors.note: Current time + timezone conversion. Reference server.

connectors.name: Everything (test)
connectors.note: Reference server exercising every MCP feature — for testing.

connectors.name: Apple / macOS
connectors.note: Messages/Notes/Calendar bridge. Community package — confirm the source.
